mapper.sql: g.id, g.enrollment_id, g.offering_id, g.student_id, g.usual_score, g.final_score, g.total_score, g.grade_point, g.passed, g.grade_status, g.remark, g.deleted, g.create_time, g.update_time, sp.student_no, sp.chinese_name, sp.english_name, c.course_code, c.course_name, o.academic_year, o.semester, o.teacher_name

FROM teaching_grade g INNER JOIN teaching_course_offering o ON o.id=g.offering_id AND o.deleted=0 INNER JOIN teaching_course c ON c.id=o.course_id AND c.deleted=0 INNER JOIN student_profile sp ON sp.id=g.student_id AND sp.deleted=0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO teaching_grade (enrollment_id, offering_id, student_id, usual_score, final_score, total_score, grade_point, passed, grade_status, remark) VALUES (#{enrollmentId}, #{offeringId}, #{studentId}, #{usualScore}, #{finalScore}, #{totalScore}, #{gradePoint}, #{passed}, #{gradeStatus}, #{remark})
mapper.update: UPDATE teaching_grade SET usual_score=#{usualScore}, final_score=#{finalScore}, total_score=#{totalScore}, grade_point=#{gradePoint}, passed=#{passed}, remark=#{remark}, update_time=NOW() WHERE id=#{id} AND deleted=0 AND grade_status='DRAFT'
UPDATE teaching_grade SET grade_status='PUBLISHED', update_time=NOW() WHERE offering_id=#{offeringId} AND deleted=0
UPDATE teaching_grade SET deleted=1, update_time=NOW() WHERE enrollment_id=#{enrollmentId} AND grade_status='DRAFT' AND deleted=0
mapper.select: SELECT WHERE g.enrollment_id=#{enrollmentId} AND g.deleted=0 LIMIT 1

SELECT
ORDER BY g.create_time DESC, g.id DESC LIMIT #{query.offset}, #{query.limit}
SELECT WHERE g.student_id=#{studentId} AND g.deleted=0 AND g.grade_status='PUBLISHED' ORDER BY o.academic_year DESC, o.semester DESC, g.id DESC
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM teaching_grade WHERE enrollment_id=#{enrollmentId} AND grade_status='PUBLISHED' AND deleted=0
SELECT WHERE g.deleted=0 AND g.grade_status='PUBLISHED' AND (g.passed=0 OR g.total_score < 60)
